series_metadata.series_description: Closed/settled Third Party Recovery cases handled by contractors. May contain Medical Histories, Authorization to gain medical history, signed approval documents (06613), and Unit correspondence, letters of settlement, copies of issued warrants, worksheets, and computer printouts of the recipient history profile.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: All paper forms are now scanned or received in digital format. Retain 30 days after hard copy is imaged and quality review is complete, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office for 1 year. Then transfer to the Records Center for 6 years. Destroy provided State and Federal audits are completed and released, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
